title: Vader's CTM Programmer Art Bricks Pack
description: (1.7.2 — 1.20.6+) Adds 8 CTM brick variants with Optifine for Programmer Art. Ported from @Vaderman24's Vader's Alternative Programmer Blocks Pack. 'V1.0.0'
body:
**[https://ko-fi.com/vaderman24](https://ko-fi.com/vaderman24)**

**[https://linktr.ee/vaderman24](https://linktr.ee/vaderman24)**

**[https://www.patreon.com/vaderman24](https://www.patreon.com/vaderman24)**

**———————————————————————————————————————————**

![Thumbnail](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2024/381/17920995-vadersctmprogrammerbrickspack-v-formc_l.webp)

([CURSEFORGE PAGE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/vaders-ctm-programmer-bricks-pack))

[wip](MASTER INFORMATION DOCUMENT)

([PLANET MINECRAFT PAGE](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/16x16-vader-s-dirty-programmer-bricks-pack-programmer-art-add-on/))

This pack requires use of one of the following mods that supports the CTM (Connected Textures Mod) feature in order to function!

[​Forge] **Optifine** (1.7.2 - 1.21.1 Mod) - https://optifine.net/downloads

[​Fabric][Quilt] **Continuity** (1.17.1 - 1.21 Mod) - [https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

[​Fabric] **Fabulously Optimized** (1.16.2 - 1.21 Modpack) - [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)






![About](https://farm5.staticflickr.com/4293/36291110345_17122e8ff3_o.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This is a simple Programmer Art resource pack addon that adds 8 new random block variants for bricks to make them appear dirtier, resembling what you would see in real life. It uses Optifine's CTM (Connected Textures Mod) random method to function.

The textures included in this pack can also be found in and were originally from my main resource pack, '[Vader's Alternative Programmer Blocks Pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/18-vaders-alternative-block-pack---1000-youtube-subscriber-special/)'.

This project supports Minecraft versions 1.7.2 - 1.20.6 all in one file. If it does not work or something seems broken on any particular version, please let me know via the comments section, dm, or email me at @vaders.contact@yahoo.com and I'll try to fix it as soon as possible.

</details>





![Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f0cf4b22f4aec084f3648dc2bba8f0d9be2f26f.png)
